scripts.check: node --check precipitation-system.js && node --check receiver-liquid-inventory.js && node --check weather-webgpu-lab.js && node --check route-wrapper.js && node --check main.js && node --check test-runtime-contracts.mjs && node --check test-receiver-liquid-inventory.mjs
scripts.validate:unit: node validate.js && node test-runtime-contracts.mjs && node test-receiver-liquid-inventory.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
